subcodes.first_line: The Most Great Talisman hath appeared in this Square which God hath made the origin and return of creation, and through which He hath opened [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ظهر الطلسم الاعظم بهذا المربع الذی جعله الله مبدء الخلق و مرجعه و به فتح
subcodes.subjects: @call to unity; prohibition of disunity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @being a source of light; guidance
